title: Aehr Test Systems Earnings Dates Call Summary Reports
text: Aehr Test Systems maintains a strong track record of earnings beats and raises. Over the past two years, the company has beaten EPS estimates 88% of the time and revenue estimates 100% of the time. This consistent outperformance reflects management's conservative guidance and strong operational execution. Upcoming earnings calls are scheduled for July 7, 2026, to discuss Q3 FY2027 results. Analysts anticipate continued revenue growth and a return to profitability. The company's next earnings announcement is expected to highlight progress on the $41 million hyperscaler contract and additional customer wins.
